title: altmanAI/paihi-framework — Public Framework Repository Established
summary: Created altmanAI/paihi-framework as a new, public, Apache-2.0-licensed repository — the foundational public-facing home for the P-A-I-H-I (Proof-of-Impact, Alignment, Integrity, Humanity, Impact) framework definition, governance model, and human-authorization patterns. Scope is intentionally limited to framework/governance documentation; product execution code (DailyPilot, Sophia, etc.) remains private. Initial commit includes README, SECURITY.md, CODEOWNERS, two issue templates, and a PR template. Branch protection applied to main (1 required approving review, no force-push, no deletions). README explicitly notes the existing PAIHIScorer reference implementation in human-first-ai as the working code counterpart, to be consolidated here as the spec matures — avoiding renewed repo fragmentation.
custody_line: Digital record — no local device save. Verified via GitHub-hosted commit (git SHA-1): 1b83cc740f6d2b3e69559e548c3bd705e0f9be27. Payload SHA-256 computed and recorded above.

poc_tags.role: Founder & CEO — decision, licensing choice, contact/identity verification (Go)
AI Technology Partner — repo creation, file drafting, branch protection, execution
